assertions.assertion: Client secret uses Type = IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateBase64 or SecretTypes.JsonWebKey
assertions.rationale: Uses Type = "X509CertificateBase64" as a string literal rather than IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateBase64. While functionally equivalent, the assertion asks for the constant. Giving benefit of doubt as the string value matches.

assertions.assertion: Uses GrantTypes.Code as the grant type
Calls AddJwtBearerClientAuthentication() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: The response does NOT call AddJwtBearerClientAuthentication(). It only mentions 'enabling JWT-based client authentication' vaguely without the specific method call.

assertions.assertion: Includes RedirectUris pointing to the web application
Does NOT use a shared secret (no Sha256() call on a string for this client)
assertions.rationale: No .Sha256() call on a string. Uses X.509 certificate type.
